item.title: Pizzoccheri Was Prominent at Winter Olympics in Italy
item.description: Pizzoccheri, a hearty buckwheat pasta, graced restaurant menus and the athletes’ cafeterias. A chef hopes it can put a spotlight on the valley where i...

item.title: France Summons U.S. Ambassador Over Comments on Activist’s Killing
item.description: Charles Kushner, President Trump’s envoy to Paris, was called in after the State Department cited “violent radical leftism” in the beating death of Qu...

item.title: ‘The Pitt’ Is the Most Patriotic Show on Television
item.description: An emergency room that’s a mirror.

item.title: BAFTAs 2026: The Best and Worst Moments
item.description: Alan Cumming forced fishy British snacks onto movie stars. Paddington Bear presented an award. And a racist slur and swearing.

item.title: The Human Cost of the Trump Administration’s War on Science
item.description: The ripple effects of cutting H.I.V. research funding.
